summary: Capsule precisely identifies RabbitMQ connection drop as root cause, captures the full reconnect-exhaustion and job-halt cascade with exact pending counts, and correctly filters recurring deprecated-endpoint-called distractors; only reconnect attempt=3 and the report_gen queue halt are missing.
improvements: Include rabbitmq reconnect attempt=3 (line 155) in evidence alongside attempts 1 and 2 — all three failed attempts confirm total reconnect exhaustion and the full retry sequence

Add the 'job processing halted: no broker connection queue=report_gen pending=8' line (line 160) to evidence — currently only email_send and image_resize queue halts appear, leaving report_gen's state invisible to the engineer
